sections.model_description: ResNet50-Product-Classifier is a ResNet-50 model fine-tuned for product category classification on e-commerce product images. The model classifies images into 25 product categories with a custom classification head.
sections.intended_use: Automated product categorization for e-commerce platforms to assist with catalog management and search indexing.
sections.out_of_scope_use: Not suitable for brand or logo detection, counterfeit detection, or quality assurance inspection.
sections.limitations: Does not perform well on images with multiple products, white-background studio shots only. Performance degrades on user-generated photos.
sections.bias_analysis: We checked for bias and it is fine.
sections.training_data: Trained on an internal dataset of 500,000 product images across 25 categories from the company's catalog (2020-2023).
sections.evaluation_metrics:
The model achieves 94% top-1 accuracy on product classification.

| Split | Top-1 Accuracy | Top-5 Accuracy |
|---|---|---|
| Validation | 87% | 96% |
| Test | 84% | 94% |
sections.ethical_considerations: Standard precautions apply. The model should not be used for pricing decisions or discriminatory product filtering.
sections.citation: He et al., 2016 — Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition.
